summary: The app entry surface builds successfully with the new mobile-safe layout changes and now exposes browser-aware navigation from the main shell.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Workflow shell adds mobile section navigation
checks.expected: App shell exposes explicit workflow anchors and quick navigation for small viewports
checks.actual: App.tsx now defines workflow section ids and a Quick Jump card that scrolls to each workflow section.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Setup surface links to the browser web
checks.expected: Setup page contains an explicit browser-web CTA and runtime browser URL resolution
checks.actual: SetupPage now offers a Browser Web action, and runtime URL resolution maps app hosts to the browser surface host/port.

checks.name: CHECK-03: Frontend build passes after the mobile app pass
checks.actual: Frontend build succeeded and produced the refreshed `index-DHcWTBea.js` and `index-bjpGm8Ch.css` bundles.
